MICHAEL HARRIMAN AND BISHOP WILLIAM JUSTICE'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 2, 2016 AT 9:30 A.M., IN DEPT. 302, TO GIVE THE OPPOSING PARTY A CHANCE TO COMPLY WITH SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.7B. THE OPPOSING PARTY SHALL IMMEDIATELY PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY OF THE OPPOSITION WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. NOT REPORTED. LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS THE ROMAN CATHOLIC ARCHBISHOP OF SAN FRANCISCO, MSGR. MICHAEL HARRIMAN, AND BISHOP WILLIAM JUSTICE'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT, DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO ALL CLAIMS ALLEGED IN THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THE RELIGION CLAUSES TO THE UNITED STATES CONSTITUTION, AS EMBODIED IN THE MINISTERIAL EXCEPTION DOCTRINE. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT IDENTIFIED ANY CLAIMS HE CAN ALLEGE THAT WOULD NOT RUN AFOUL OF THIS DOCTRINE. BOTH ORDER AFTER HEARING AND SEPARATE JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-08-2016 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-02-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. MICHAEL T. WELCH, ESQ. of Law Offices of Michael T. Welch, Tel No. 415-399-1500 appearing with and for the Plaintiff LODOVICO LANDI;
Atty. DANIEL C. ZAMORA, ESQ. of Weintraub Tobin, Tel No. 415-772-9639 appearing for the Defendants The Roman Catholic Archbisoph of San Francisco, Msgr. Michael Harriman, and Bishop William Justice.

Matter argued and submitted by counsel. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. As to DEFENDANTS THE ROMAN CATHOLIC ARCHBISHOP OF SAN FRANCISCO, MSGR. MICHAEL HARRIMAN, AND BISHOP WILLIAM JUSTICE'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT, Defendants' demurrer to all claims alleged in the first amended complaint is sustained without leave to amend. The Religion Clauses to the United States Constitution, as embodied in the Ministerial Exception doctrine. Plaintiff has not identified any claims he can allege that would not run afoul of this doctrine. BOTH ORDER AFTER HEARING AND SEPARATE JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-13-2016 Continued To Feb-02-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

DEFENDANTS THE ROMAN CATHOLIC ARCHBISHOP OF SAN FRANCISCO, MSGR. MICHAEL HARRIMAN AND BISHOP WILLIAM JUSTICE'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is continued to February 2, 2016 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302, to give the opposing party a chance to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.7B. The opposing party shall immediately provide a courtesy copy of the opposition with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/EG)
